pull_quotes: The grammar supplies the question; it cannot supply the missing custom.
They do, however, make one question reasonable: what happens when the material of communication is designed to keep source, intention, and relationship available for notice?
The language did not mislay the hour. It looked at the hour and said no.
A community anchored in use shrugs off reform; a community anchored in design is one clever proposal away from splitting.
A rehearsal is not a rewiring, and this book will not blur the two.
Transparency gives the memory somewhere to put the meaning. It does not put it there unaided.
Peace linguistics becomes euphemism the moment it makes a witness borrow the gentler word.
The literature does not pre-write the community's agreement. It gives disagreement a page number.
Disclosure without an answerable human is a label on a can.
Nobody joins a choir to delay aging. They join to sing.
Distance that cannot be declined stops being distance. It is testimony on a schedule.
That leaves room for a lens, but none for a locked room.
A paradigm and a vocabulary. The manifesto describes its gift to its members as a way of seeing and a stock of words.
Escape, not conquest, is what words are built for, and designed words have been escaping their designers for a century.
The language offers the practice; speakers do the work.
Borrow a word. That is the entire first invitation.
